strengths: Proven automation and ETL pipeline delivery
improvement_bullets: Managed a JIRA board ticketing system to track and prioritize analytics requests and project workflows, ensuring efficient task management and timely delivery of insights.
Leveraged AI tools within Python workflows to automate data quality validation and reporting processes, enhancing efficiency and accuracy in data pipelines.
Ingested and processed data using Databricks environments to perform complex data transformations and analysis, supporting robust downstream analytics and reporting.
Developed and maintained ETL pipelines using Python, SQL, and Databricks to integrate data from various sources, ensuring data consistency and accuracy for analytical purposes.
Translated complex findings from statistical analyses in BigQuery into actionable recommendations, presenting them to stakeholders to drive data-informed strategic decisions.
cover_letter:
Justin Miller
October 26, 2023

Hiring Manager
Samba TV

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Measurement Analyst position at Samba TV. With my background in data analytics and operational efficiency, I am confident I would be a strong addition to your team.

Samba TV's mission to provide real-time, at-scale media intelligence and build the future of cross-channel media measurement is incredibly compelling. I am particularly impressed by your use of billions of signals to connect media consumption with real-world actions, a sophisticated approach I am eager to contribute to.

In my previous roles, I have significantly improved data workflows and delivered impactful insights through advanced analytics. Additionally, I have a proven track record of developing automated reporting solutions, which directly aligns with your need for efficient data extraction and processing.

Specifically, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports, saving 8 hours per week and enhancing reporting accuracy. I also created statistical models for customer segmentation that drove a 300% increase in revenue for targeted segments. While not explicitly listed as 'Databricks,' I have extensive experience with BigQuery and Snowflake for data warehousing and processing, and I am adept at quickly learning and applying new big data technologies. My project experience includes architecting a production-grade ELT pipeline in Python and SQL for BigQuery, demonstrating my ability to handle complex data ingestion and modeling.

I am particularly drawn to Samba TV's mission of enabling data-informed decisions for leading brands and believe my experience in statistical analysis, data visualization (Tableau, Power BI), and building repeatable processes would allow me to contribute meaningfully from day one. I am also eager to leverage AI tools to further enhance workflows and outputs.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your team's goals. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Justin Miller
